title: schiedea adamantis
intro: Schiedea adamantis, also known as the 'Ohia lehua, is a rare and endangered flowering plant native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Schiedea adamantis is typically used as a tea or tincture, and is often combined with other Hawaiian plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
